name: Sweet Cornmeal Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine sugar, oil, egg and milk; mix well.
2. In another bowl, combine dry ingredients; stir in sugar mixture just until moistened.
3. Pour batter into four muffin cups that have been lined with papers or coated with nonstick cooking spray.
4. Bake at 400 degrees for 15-18 minutes or until lightly browned.
